subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous monument is located in Jaipur?
question_hi: जयपुर में किस मौलिक मंदिर है?
C_en: Cenotaph of Maharaja Sawai Man Singh
explanation_en: Amber Fort is a famous monument located in Jaipur, built by Raja Mansingh.
explanation_hi: अमेर फोट एक बेहत के विविध मंदिर है, उसका निर्दीनाने बना उसका
explanation_en: Hawa Mahal is a famous monument located in Jaipur, built by Maharaja Sawai Pratap Singh.
explanation_hi: हवा महाल प्रतिमान सावाई बेहत का विविध मंदिर है।
explanation_en: The Palace of winds, also known as Hawa Mahal, is a famous monument located in Jaipur, built by Maharaja Sawai Pratap Singh.
explanation_hi: हवा महाल, प्रतिमान सावाई बेहत का विविध मंदिर है।
explanation_en: The Cenotaph of Maharaja Sawai Mansingh is a famous monument located in Jaipur, built by Maharaja Sawai Pratap Singh.
explanation_hi: सवाई बेहत का विविध मंदिर है।
explanation_en: The Cenotaph of Maharaja Sawai Man Singh is a famous monument located in Jaipur, built by Maharaja Sawai Pratap Singh.
explanation_hi: सवाई बेहत का विविध मंदिर है।
